/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/kiosk-agent.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/kiosk-agent.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kiosk-agent.dir/src/AgentApp.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kiosk-agent.dir/src/platform/linux/LinuxServiceStub.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kiosk-agent.dir/src/platform/windows/WindowsServiceStub.cpp.o" -o kiosk-agent
